data.body: PASS 1 review (T3 Integration feasibility — overlay): PASS / not-applicable. The plan composes only internal, already-used components — fetcher.fetch_snapshot, the inbound/outbound differs, the applier, and the existing FakeAcliClient (tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/_fakes.py mirroring real method signatures search_issues/get_comment_map/get_issuelinks_map). No new external API/CLI/service/library is adopted and no previously-unused capability is asserted, so the overlay does not apply. No findings.
